title: sloanea grossa
intro: Sloanea grossa, also known as the Sloane's magenta or purple velvet berry, is a tropical plant species native to the Philippines. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. Sloanea grossa is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and capsules, as well as being used in traditional remedies like ointments and salves.
